reconstruction_confidence_reason: The Constitutional AI paper, Anthropic's usage policies, and Claude's model card provide substantial documentation of behavioral principles. Specific prompt wording is reconstructed from behavioral analysis; Anthropic has not published verbatim system prompts.

sources.title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback
Community behavioral analysis — AI System Prompts Library contributors

notes: Claude is unique among frontier models in its use of Constitutional AI, which trains the model to internalize a set of explicit principles and apply them through chain-of-thought reasoning. This creates more consistent behavior across reformulations but also more verbose refusals. The operator/user trust hierarchy is well-documented in Anthropic's public materials and is a key differentiator from OpenAI's approach.
